name: schoen-claude-status-devtools
description: Dev-tooling only — NOT the application and NOT published. The statusline app is Python (installed via install.py / install.sh). This manifest exists solely to pin the aislop AI-slop gate so the per-edit hook and CI run a lockfile-integrity-verified LOCAL binary (node_modules/.bin/aislop) instead of `npx --yes aislop@x` against the live registry. Install with `npm ci --ignore-scripts`.
